programs.title: American Restoration
programs.desc: A customer brings by a disassembled 59 BMW motorcycle with a side car for Rick to restore. Will he be able to return the bike to its glory days or will missing parts force him to abandon the project?

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.sub_title: The Jenny, The Baker, The Prosthetics Maker
programs.desc: It's Brandi's birthday, so naturally, Jarrod brings her to an auction in Menifee. Darrell tries to find another 'All Ten' locker, needing a leg up to do so. Rene stands his ground to protect his honour.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: On the third leg of their Italian adventure, Mike and Frank head south to Sicily where an American contact agrees to show them around. Later, the search is on for a very specific vintage Vespa.

programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Rick Dale tries to purchase a dilapidated helicopter, an old pistol from the 1700s that probably does not even work anymore and a horse-racing carriage from the 19th century.

programs.title: Highway Patrol
programs.desc: A man is face-to-face with a possibility of electrocution by live power after smashing into a light pole, leaving officers perplexed as to how the accident occurred.

programs.title: Highway Patrol
programs.desc: If a happy wife means a happy life then one man's in big trouble when he's suspected of driving under the influence of drugs. At stake is his job and big fines - but that is the least of his worries. Then, a standard ticket causes an aggressive reaction and a man speeding at double the limit claims he has a good reason but must convince the police first.
